steps.title: Spot the key signal
steps.content: Jamie Okuma's defining characteristic is that her work simultaneously exists in both a museum (fine art institution) and an online boutique (commercial marketplace). This single fact directly contradicts what the critics must be claiming about fine art and fashion.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content:
Intersect means to come together or overlap in the same space.

If fine art and fashion rarely intersect, the critics are claiming these domains seldom meet—a view Okuma's dual-domain presence directly refutes.

The other choices don't fit: prevail and succumb don't describe domain relationships, and diverge means to separate—the opposite of what we need.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
